ns1:revision.ns1:comment: add links to LUG'20 and LUG'22
ns1:revision.ns1:text:
[https://www.rc.ufl.edu/lug-2021-agenda/ LUG 2021] was to be held in Gainesville, FL on May 19th-20th at the [https://www.rc.ufl.edu/ University of Florida Research Computing].
The event was instead held virtually due to the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic.
== LUG 2021 Agenda ==
=== Wednesday, May 19th === {| border=1 cellpadding=0
|- |''' 9:00-9:05am''' |'''Opening Remarks''' : OpenSFS, University of Florida ([https://youtu.be/zgxLMzW0Vr8 video])
|- |''' 9:05-9:35am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2021-Community_Release_Update-Jones.pdf|Lustre Community Release Update]]''' ([https://youtu.be/p58juA-SFDQ video]) : Peter Jones, Whamcloud
|- |''' 9:35-10:05am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2021-Status_Linux_Native_Lustre-Simmons.pdf|Status of the Linux Native Lustre Client]]''' ([https://youtu.be/wmX9kN8JCWs video]) : James Simmons, ORNL
|- |''' 10:05-10:35am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2021-Triad_Based_Architecture_rdlab-Alvarez.pdf|A Triad based Architecture for a Multipurpose Lustre Filesystem at /rdlab]]''' ([https://youtu.be/-WXESiWhgAQ video]) : Gabriel Verdejo Alvarez, Univeritat Politecnica de Catalunya (UPC)
|- |''' 10:35-11:05am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2021-Impact_ZFS_Direct_Performance-Brumgard.pdf|Impact of ZFS Direct I/O on OSD Performance]]''' ([https://youtu.be/cm6xwO8UxSM video]) : Christopher Brumgard, ORNL
|- |''' 11:15am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2021-Efficient_Metadata_Scanning_ZFS-Miller.pdf|Efficient Metadata Scanning using ZFS and NVMe-over-Fabrics]]''' ([https://youtu.be/H2G7DjDYOpE video]) : Ross Miller, ORNL
|- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''11:45am''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Break''' :
|- |''' 11:45am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2021-DDN_AI_EXAScaler-Coomer.pdf|Optimizations for AI in the EXAScaler Filesystem]]''' ([https://youtu.be/NgQC3z1iyoo video]) : James Coomer, DDN
|- |''' 12:00pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2021-File_Level_Erasure_Coding-Disney.pdf|File Level Erasure Coding in Lustre]]''' ([https://youtu.be/wvyUFRJsUpk video]) : Adam Disney, ORNL
|- |''' 12:30pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2021-Lustre_at_Scale_ALCF-Kulyavtsev.pdf|Lustre at Scale: ALCF Update]]''' ([https://youtu.be/X8sWWn3hU3k video]) : Alex Kulyavtsev, Gordon McPheeters, ANL
|- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|''' 1:00pm''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Virtual Networking Session''' : |}
=== Thursday, May 20th === {| border=1 cellpadding=0
|- |''' 9:00am''' |'''Opening Remarks''' : OpenSFS, University of Florida ([https://youtu.be/zWh3UgN_5Ng video])
|- |''' 9:05am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2021-Accelerating_AI_at_Scale-Bernauer-Kashinkunti.pdf|Accelerating AI at-scale with Selene DGXA100 SuperPOD and Lustre Parallel Filesystem Storage]]''' ([https://youtu.be/JxEfWbKrGYY video]) : Prethvi Kashinkunti and Julie Bernauer, NVIDIA
|- |''' 9:35am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2021-Lustre_2.15_and_Beyond-Dilger.pdf|Lustre 2.15 and Beyond]]''' ([https://youtu.be/0WrHfm_R82A video]) : Andreas Dilger, Whamcloud
|- |''' 10:05am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2021-Lustre_Client_Encryption-Buisson.pdf|Lustre Client Encryption]]''' ([https://youtu.be/QAG3XyIj1YY video]) : Sébastien Buisson, Whamcloud
|- |''' 10:35am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2021-Update_on_Secure_Lustre_Sanger-Beal-Antoniu.pdf|Update on “Secure Lustre”]]''' ([https://youtu.be/0cT7fYKaZ4M video]) : James Beal, Pavlos Antoniou, Wellcome Sanger Institute UK
|- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''11:05am''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Break''' :
|- |''' 11:30am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2021-Evaluation_DoM_DNE_Scaling-Simmons.pdf|Evaluation of DoM/DNE scaling performance in Lustre]]''' ([https://youtu.be/r87GuYsgjJM video]) : James Simmons, ORNL
|- |''' 12:00pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2021-Easy_User_Access_Jobstats_Robinhood-Guibault.pdf|Giving Easy User Access to Lustre JobStats and Robinhood Information]]''' ([https://youtu.be/JzXbseN6bRg video]) : Simon Guilbault, Université Laval
|- |''' 12:30pm''' |'''OpenSFS Update and Annual Meeting''' ([https://youtu.be/O9l-AwKg2X0 video]) : OpenSFS
|- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|''' 1:00pm''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Virtual Networking Session''' |}
[[Lustre User Group 2020|<- LUG'20]] | [[Lustre User Group 2022|LUG'22 ->]]
[[Category: LUG]] [[Category: Events]]
